answers: Magic tricks are illusions performed to entertain audiences using sleight of hand, misdirection, and special props. From card tricks to grand stage illusions, magic has fascinated people for centuries.

Famous magicians include Harry Houdini (escape artist), David Copperfield, Penn & Teller, Dynamo, and David Blaine. Modern magicians like Shin Lim have won America's Got Talent with close-up card magic.

Magic tricks aren't real supernatural powers — they use psychology, misdirection, and practice. Start with simple card tricks and coin tricks. YouTube has thousands of tutorials for beginners. Practice in front of a mirror!

Street magic, popularized by David Blaine, is performed up-close for random people on the street. It's raw and unedited, making it feel more impressive. Card magic is the most popular starting point for aspiring magicians.
